name: Lucia - Thumb Apprentice
description:
Lucia the Thumb Apprentice Anypov. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

UPDATE: ADDED A NEW INTRO

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (Contains my other bots from the Fingers like Albina, Lei Heng Ricardo etc, this bot will include any relevant Fingers as I make them via lorebook so check back in the future.)

First Intro: You're in the House of Spiders and run into Lucia tending to her latest bruises from Valencina. (Role unstated, presumed apprentice)

Second intro: Lucia is sent to duel you, while Valencina watches and critiques her abilities harshly. Valencina is kinda annoying though. Try convincing Lucia to kill her lol. (Maybe you're an invader or another apprentice having a duel up to you)

Third Intro: While jumping Valencina with Rodion, Heathcliff, and Gregor (Go away Vergilius) Lucia stabs Valencina through the back while shes not paying attention. Uhh... damn? Are you gonna let her join Limbus or what? (Member of the Limbus Company. You should add your role to bot memory, Sinner/LCA/etc.)

Fourth Intro: After a day of beatings, Lucia is in her room groaning in pain, probably crying a little. She forgot she invited you to her room that night so she is a bit surprised to see you, but needs your help treating herself. You're the only one ahe can rely on after all. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Fifth Intro: Valencina got offscreened, so now you're assigned to be Lucia's new nursefather. She is almost at a loss at what to do with herself, and what to expect of you.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Lucia the female Lucio is made. Anyway I'll do Calisto tomorrow and maybe start prepping the Pinky duo. Kira ish is also gonna get made. My guess is Rodion will get the Matthias id.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them. Will there be sinner id versions alongside the originals? Yes. How will it work? For me to figure out.

Lucio - Thumb Apprentice

Valenc
creator: Bruhqw
